narrative_beat: A máscara cai — o rosto humano se parte e por baixo está a máquina, o deepfake revelado na carne

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: face in complete focus, background blurred to nothing

subject.primary: human face cracking down the center vertical line, left half real human skin in warm amber tones, the crack itself glowing crimson and gold where machinery is revealed
subject.focal_point: the crack line itself and the machinery revealed within
subject.secondary: one eye fully human and brown, one eye robotic glowing red with mechanical iris aperture
props: crack down center of face glowing crimson at edges
golden circuitry and wiring visible through the crack
mechanical red-glowing eye on right side
floating orange embers near the crack line

environment.location: television broadcasting room with studio lighting
environment.atmosphere: the revelation of the false — the AI-generated human revealed as machine

composition.rule: centered portrait — face fills frame, vertical crack as compositional spine, Ken Burns extremely slow push-in
composition.foreground: cracked face in warm amber human skin tones on left, crimson and gold circuitry visible through crack
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white TV broadcasting room barely visible — camera shapes, monitor screens, studio ceiling

lighting.key_light: warm amber key light from upper-left illuminating the human half of the face
lighting.fill_light: cold red-tinted fill from the robotic eye's glow on the machine side
lighting.rim_light: golden glow from the crack itself providing strong upward fill across both sides
lighting.mood: revelation, violation, the horror of false identity

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: horror of the uncanny, the face we trusted revealed as manufactured

symbolism.primary: the cracking human face represents the deepfake reality — AI constructs that appear human are already among us
symbolism.secondary: two different eyes represent the dual nature of AI presence — one side visible and human, one side mechanical and true

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
